data.body: Fix identified: test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present searches for first WORKTREE_TRACKING:start in SKILL.md globally (line 179 = resume scan description), but needs first occurrence AFTER the ticket transition line (line 200). Fix: filter grep results to only lines > _transition_line. Fix verified: all 6 tests pass with change applied. File: tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh lines 89-96.
